greeting.text: Keep your voice down. If you've coin and you're no friend of the law, we can do business. LIST to see what I've got.

responses.text: Why is some of your stock locked?

brotherhood.text: The Brotherhood, same as everyone who works this coast. Cross them and you'll find my better goods are suddenly none of your concern.

trust.text: The good stuff's only for those the Brotherhood still trusts. Keep hunting our people and I'll sell you rope and torches, nothing more.

end.text: Mind the tide on your way out.
